subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-17 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The friends in Meelan were self-sacrificing from the beginning of the Cause. They have always endured calamities and hardships.... We are continually working hard, writing and writing.... Endeavor ye night and day that the banner of the Covenant may wave as it should
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
